name: Cresswind Twin Lakes Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Cresswind Twin Lakes Pickleball Courts in Hoschton, GA! There are 33 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and water.

name: Jack Purcell Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Jack Purcell Pickleball Courts in Jefferson, GA! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Jefferson Parks and Recreation Department
description: Jefferson Parks and Recreation Department is a place to play pickleball in Jefferson, GA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: The Village at Deaton Creek
description: The Village at Deaton Creek is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hoschton, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
